briefdescription.para: Mailbox of the data manager task.
Instance of metrics builder helper class.
Instance of measurement builder helper class.
flag deciding if data are sent to http connector

detaileddescription.para: Flag indicating that displacement calculation is disabled (15 sec raw data storage)
RMS Z Threshold to enable / disable Raw/Displacement data transmission and displacement calculation

name
The name of the class
have_mqtt_connector
Flag indicationg if MQTT Connector is used (X1 devices) or not (MINI devices)
The constructor allocate and register the mailbox of the AD converter task and allocates and initialize the cyclic timer for Todo
with duration of 10 ms and period of 20 ms.
The destructor is never called and is implemented only for completion reasons. It simply triggers a debug message on info debug level.

The function directly enters the endless loop and wait for messages. Task wakes up when a message is in the mailbox and read the message by calling mailbox read method which returns the pointer pElem to the message. All expected messages will be handled, in case of an unexpected message an error debug message will be triggered. Finally the message will be released by calling class PoolElem method free, if the pointer pElem is not explicitly set to 0.
Message Handling:
eLteReport: Received report request, change sender to eDataManager and forward request to LTE monitor task. The pointer pElem will be set to 0, to prevent releasing the message.
eLteLinkQuality: Add payload to metrics JSON string by calling function add provided by metricsBuilder class. In case metrics JSON string is complete, finalize and publish it by calling function finalize of metricsBuilder class and member function publishMetrics. Finally metrics JSON string will be cleared by calling function reset also provided by metricsBuilder class.
eLteBattVoltage: same as eLteLinkQuality
eLteTemperature: same as eLteLinkQuality
eLtePsmAct: same as eLteLinkQuality
eResetCause: same as eLteLinkQuality
eBootCnt: same as eLteLinkQuality
eAdcData: same as eLteLinkQuality
eShtcxTemperature: same as eLteLinkQuality
eShtcxHumidity: same as eLteLinkQuality
eLteIMSI: same as eLteLinkQuality
eLteFwVersion: same as eLteLinkQuality
eHwMetrics: same as eLteLinkQuality
eAdxl37xRmsData: Add RMS values to payload variable of class measurement and store hit values in member varaibles of this class
eDispStatistics: same as eRmsReport
eMaxXYZ: Add x, y and z maximum values to member variables of measurement class
eRmsReport: In case measurement JSON string is complete, finalize and publish it by calling function finalize of measurementBuilder class and member function publishMeasurements. Finally measurement JSON string will be cleared by calling function reset also provided by measurementBuilder class.
eDispStatistics: In case measurement JSON string is complete, finalize and publish it by calling function finalize of measurementBuilder class and member function publishMeasurements. Finally measurement JSON string will be cleared by calling function reset also provided by measurementBuilder class.

briefdescription.para: Timer expired function for the timer (UNUSED)

detaileddescription.para:
chmask
Channel bitmask
The function initializes the static pool element e1 with message type eTimerExpired, set AD converter task as sender, copy channel bitmask chmask in the payload of the message and put message into own (data managers's) mailbox.

briefdescription.para: Data manager virtual task configure function.

detaileddescription.para: The configure function overloads the configure function of the task base class. It retrieves the configuration related to sensors by call of the function getCfgSensor to get the sensor threshold values, retrieve the configuration version by call of function getCfgGeneral, retrieve the configuration related to datalog by call of function getCfgDatalog and retrieve the configuration related to metrics by call of function getCfgMetrics. Configuration version, metrics interval, thresholds and activation flags will be stored in internal string variables of the MetricsBuilder class by calling its related setter functions. Private variable bDispModeOff will be set according to configuration string dispmodeoff and private variable rms_z_thres according to rms_thres.

briefdescription.para: Timer callback function for the timer (UNUSED)

detaileddescription.para:
timer
Pointer to timer of type k_timer
The function retrieve the user-specific data from the timer by calling kernel function k_timer_user_data_get and call timer expired member function timer1_expired with the channel bitmask as parameter extracted from the user-specific data of type AdcTimerInfo.

briefdescription.para: Send function to publish measurement JSON string to MQTT connector task.

detaileddescription.para: The function retrieve the measurement JSON string from the MeasurementBuilder class, request a message from message pool, copy the measurement JSON string in the payload of the message by calling function putString of the PoolElem class, set message type to eMeasurements, set eDataManager as sender and send message to MQTT connector mailbox.

briefdescription.para: Send function to publish metrics JSON string to MQTT connector task.

detaileddescription.para: The function retrieve the metrics JSON string from the MetricsBuilder class, request a message from message pool, copy the metrics JSON string in the payload of the message by calling function putString of the PoolElem class, set message type to eMetrics, set eDataManager as sender and send message to MQTT connector mailbox.

briefdescription.para: DataManager class derived from task base class.

simplesect.title: Detailed Description
simplesect.para:
The data manager class is responsible to collect metrics and measurement data, to construct the metrics and measurement JSON strings with support of the metrics builder class and the measurement builder class and to publish metrics and measurement JSON strings by sending them to the MQTT connector task. It provides two publish methods, one for metrics and the other one for measurement data. Message Interaction:
Receive
LTE monitor task
LTE connector task
Power manager task
AD converter task
Shtcx task
HW metrics task
Transmit
MQTT connector task
